<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [INWX](https://www.inwx.de/en) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/inwx/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "inwx"
  dnsCredentials:
    # INWX_PASSWORD: Password
    password: ""
    # INWX_USERNAME: Username
    username: ""
    # INWX_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # INWX_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 360)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # INWX_SANDBOX: Activate the sandbox (boolean)
    sandbox: ""
    # INWX_SHARED_SECRET: shared secret related to 2FA
    sharedSecret: ""
    # INWX_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 300)
    ttl: ""
```

You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
Credentials may also be supplied directly as system environment variables, in which case `dnsCredentials` can be omitted.
